_Comment_DataDir: Root directory for persistent state. Subfolders are created automatically: cache/ (DNS, SMTP, HTTP probes) and auth/ (users.json).
_Comment_Auth: Token hash for the root 'ednsv' user. Set to 'none' (the default) to disable authentication entirely. Otherwise, generate a random secret and store ONLY its hash here. Hash algorithm: base64url(sha256(utf8-bytes(token))) — no BOM, no padding ('=' stripped, '+'->'-', '/'->'_'). Example: echo -n 'my-secret-token' | openssl dgst -sha256 -binary | basenc --base64url | tr -d '='. The environment variable EDNSV_AUTH_TOKEN_HASH overrides this setting.
